creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #6)
For the chromium part, we need ninja. The chromium in qt5-webengine is so old, it might build with samurai, but according to bug #270876, more recent chromium does not.

I will work on fixing these, but if Qt 6.8.x still doesn’t build as-is, it will have to wait until after 6.8.3 has landed. I have 6.8.3 and 6.9.0-pre going on simultaneously right now and I’d rather not throw more complexity into the equation.
